scripts.build: node build.mjs && mkdirp dist && j2w -i build/bundle.js --initLocation http://test-space-portal.localhost -o dist/test-space-portal.wasm
scripts.build:debug: node build.mjs && mkdirp dist && j2w -d -i build/bundle.js --initLocation http://test-space-portal.localhost -o dist/test-space-portal.wasm
